title: Deconstruct AsyncLocalStorage Internals
description: Deconstruct the internal workings of `AsyncLocalStorage` for context propagation. Implement `AsyncLocalStorage` to propagate request-scoped context (tracing, authentication) across asynchronous boundaries. Analyze how `AsyncLocalStorage` bypasses manual prop-drilling in complex asynchronous flows.
objectives: Deconstruct the internal workings of `AsyncLocalStorage` for context propagation.
Implement `AsyncLocalStorage` to propagate request-scoped context (tracing, authentication) across asynchronous boundaries.
Analyze how `AsyncLocalStorage` bypasses manual prop-drilling in complex asynchronous flows.
